ast.name: error
ast.target: AI 链接增强器 API 错误：

ast.name: log
ast.source: Automatic Linker: allFiles for Trie building:
ast.target: 自动链接器：用于构建 Trie 的所有文件：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, the file will be automatically formatted (links replaced) when saving.
ast.target: 启用后，保存文件时将自动格式化（替换链接）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, the plugin will use Obsidian's 'Folder to create new notes in' setting as the base directory for omitting folder prefixes in links.
ast.target: 启用后，插件将使用 Obsidian 的“创建新笔记的文件夹”设置作为省略链接中文件夹前缀的基础目录。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, aliases will be included when processing links. Note: A restart is required for changes to take effect.
ast.target: 启用后，处理链接时将包含别名。注意：更改需要重启才能生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, the plugin will automatically resolve namespaces for shorthand links. If multiple candidates share the same shorthand, the candidate with the most common path segments relative to the current file will be selected.
ast.target: 启用后，插件将自动解析简写链接的命名空间。如果多个候选项共享相同的简写，将选择相对于当前文件具有最多公共路径段的候选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, links that match date formats (e.g. 2025-02-10) will be ignored. This helps maintain compatibility with Obsidian Tasks.
ast.target: 启用后，匹配日期格式（例如 2025-02-10）的链接将被忽略。这有助于保持与 Obsidian Tasks 的兼容性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, headings (lines starting with #) will not have links added to them.
ast.target: 启用后，标题（以 # 开头的行）将不会添加链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, Markdown table rows will not have links added to them.
ast.target: 启用后，Markdown 表格行将不会添加链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, link matching will be case-insensitive. The original case of the text will be preserved in the link.
ast.target: 启用后，链接匹配将不区分大小写。链接中将保留文本的原始大小写。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When 'Ignore case' is OFF, match text that is capitalized at the start of a sentence. For example, 'My name' at a sentence start will match the file 'my name'. This setting is ignored when 'Ignore case' is ON.
ast.target: 当“忽略大小写”关闭时，匹配句子开头大写的文本。例如，句子开头的“My name”将匹配文件“my name”。当“忽略大小写”开启时，此设置将被忽略。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, text will not be linked to its own file. For example, the word 'VPN' inside VPN.md will not be converted to a link.
ast.target: 启用后，文本将不会链接到其自身的文件。例如，VPN.md 中的单词“VPN”将不会转换为链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Directories to be excluded from automatic linking, one per line (e.g. 'Templates')
ast.target: 要从自动链接中排除的目录，每行一个（例如“Templates”）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Directories where link aliases should be removed, one per line (e.g. 'dir' will convert [[dir/xxx|yyy]] to [[dir/xxx]]). This affects both auto-generated aliases and frontmatter aliases.
ast.target: 应移除链接别名的目录，每行一个（例如“dir”将把 [[dir/xxx|yyy]] 转换为 [[dir/xxx]]）。这会影响自动生成的别名和 frontmatter 别名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, Obsidian Linter will be executed after Automatic Linker formatting. This requires the Obsidian Linter plugin to be installed.
ast.target: 启用后，自动链接器格式化后将执行 Obsidian Linter。这需要安装 Obsidian Linter 插件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, Prettier will be executed after Automatic Linker formatting. This requires prettier-format plugin to be installed. https://github.com/dylanarmstrong/obsidian-prettier-plugin
ast.target: 启用后，自动链接器格式化后将执行 Prettier。这需要安装 prettier-format 插件。https://github.com/dylanarmstrong/obsidian-prettier-plugin

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Delay in milliseconds before formatting. Increase this value if the linter/prettier runs before the file is fully saved.
ast.target: 格式化前的延迟（毫秒）。如果 linter/prettier 在文件完全保存前运行，请增加此值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, raw URLs will be replaced with [Page Title](URL). Requires fetching the URL content.
ast.target: 启用后，原始 URL 将被替换为 [页面标题](URL)。需要获取 URL 内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Ignore domains for replacing URLs with titles, one per line (e.g. x.com)
ast.target: 忽略用于将 URL 替换为标题的域名，每行一个（例如 x.com）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, GitHub URLs will be formatted when saving the file.
ast.target: 启用后，保存文件时将格式化 GitHub URL。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add your GitHub Enterprise URLs, one per line (e.g. github.enterprise.com)
ast.target: 添加您的 GitHub Enterprise URL，每行一个（例如 github.enterprise.com）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, JIRA URLs will be formatted when saving the file.
ast.target: 启用后，保存文件时将格式化 JIRA URL。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add your JIRA URLs, one per line (e.g. jira.enterprise.com)
ast.target: 添加您的 JIRA URL，每行一个（例如 jira.enterprise.com）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, Linear URLs will be formatted when saving the file.
ast.target: 启用后，保存文件时将格式化 Linear URL。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display a notice when markdown files are loaded.
ast.target: 加载 Markdown 文件时显示通知。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, debug information will be logged to the console.
ast.target: 启用后，调试信息将记录到控制台。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, an AI-powered link enhancer command will be available. It uses a local LLM to resolve ambiguous links and correct existing ones.
ast.target: 启用后，将提供一个 AI 驱动的链接增强器命令。它使用本地 LLM 来解析模糊链接并更正现有链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The URL of your OpenAI-compatible AI server (e.g. LM Studio, Ollama).
ast.target: 您的 OpenAI 兼容 AI 服务器的 URL（例如 LM Studio、Ollama）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The name of the model to use (e.g. gemma-4-7b).
ast.target: 要使用的模型名称（例如 gemma-4-7b）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of characters around the link to provide as context to the AI.
ast.target: 链接周围提供给 AI 作为上下文的字符数。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Respect 'Folder to create new notes in' setting
ast.target: 遵循“创建新笔记的文件夹”设置

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 从自动链接中排除目录

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 格式化后运行 Obsidian Linter

ast.name: setName
ast.target: GitHub 的 URL 格式化

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 保存时格式化 GitHub URL

ast.name: setName
ast.target: Jira 的 URL 格式化

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 保存时格式化 JIRA URL

ast.name: setName
ast.target: Linear 的 URL 格式化

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 保存时格式化 Linear URL

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 启用 AI 链接增强

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Failed to generate link using Obsidian API:
ast.target: 使用 Obsidian API 生成链接失败：

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: AI Link Enhancement is not enabled in settings.
ast.target: 设置中未启用 AI 链接增强。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: AI Link Enhancement failed. Check console for details.
ast.target: AI 链接增强失败。请检查控制台获取详情。

ast.name: content
ast.source: You are an assistant that helps resolve ambiguous links in Obsidian notes. You must respond ONLY with a valid JSON object. Do not include any explanation or markdown code blocks.
ast.target: 你是一个助手，帮助解决 Obsidian 笔记中模糊的链接。你必须仅以有效的 JSON 对象形式回复。不要包含任何解释或 Markdown 代码块。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 运行 AI 链接增强器

ast.name: text
ast.target: AI 链接增强器：正在分析上下文...
